title: SMRPG Moleville Mountain Cart Ride on Mario Paint Composer
description:
This is the song that plays during the cart ride minigame under Moleville Mountain in Super Mario RPG for the SNES (after beating Punchinello). It is a upbeat and non-reptative song that isn't too complicated or empty and doesn't rely on held-out notes. This is the type of song that I like to do on Mario Paint Comoposer.

Thanks to HCBailly for his tutorial on how to smoothen transitions between clips using Windows Movie Maker.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker

All free, legal, and unlimited.
